creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-08-14 20:02:07 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    science              Makefile 
  Added files:
    science/libquantum   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  libquantum is a C library for the simulation of quantum
  mechanics, with a special focus laid to quantum computing.
  It started as a pure quantum computer simulator, but
  support for general quantum simulation has been recently
  added.
  
  WWW:    http://www.libquantum.de/
  
  PR:             ports/137468
  Submitted by:   Wen Heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.153     +1 -0      ports/science/Makefile
  1.1       +21 -0     ports/science/libquantum/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/science/libquantum/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/science/libquantum/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/science/libquantum/pkg-plist (new)
